query:
SELECT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM workspace_members wm
            JOIN role_permissions rp ON wm.role_id = rp.role_id
            JOIN permissions p ON rp.permission_id = p.id
            WHERE wm.workspace_id = $1 
              AND wm.user_id = $2 
              AND p.name = $3
        ) as "has_perm!"
